# NNNN. <title>

- Status: Proposed <!-- Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by NNNN -->
- Date: YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What problem or force prompted this decision? Keep it factual.

## Decision

The decision, stated in the present tense ("We use ...").

## Consequences

What becomes easier and what becomes harder as a result. Include follow-ups.

## Alternatives considered

Options that were weighed and why they were rejected.
